positive: A detailed, mystical botanical composition featuring bioluminescent celestial flora and intertwining cosmic roots. The style is a high-contrast, detailed engraving and etched illustration, rendered in deep matte black ink with subtle accents of electric indigo and gold foil highlights. The arrangement should form a central, circular mandala structure, suitable for textile printing. Focus on clean, flowing lines and strong, readable silhouettes of ethereal leaves, crescent moons, and exotic vines. Flat composition, symmetrical, perfect for central placement on apparel. Art Nouveau meets Cosmic Minimalism.
negative: blur, low resolution, noise, artifact, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn hands, cartoon, sketch, messy, amateur
